notableEvents.label: Carson Benge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Carson Benge grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Francisco Alvarez out at 2nd. Carson Benge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Mark Vientos pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Mark Vientos grounds out, third baseman Nolan Gorman to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Iván Herrera plunked

notableEvents.label: Alec Burleson GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alec Burleson grounds into a double play, pitcher Cionel Pérez to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Jared Young. Iván Herrera out at 2nd. Alec Burleson out at 1st.
